title: Security Advisory for .NET packages hosted at the NuGet Gallery
description: Security Advisory for .NET packages hosted at the NuGet Gallery on GitHub

items.content_html:
An integer overflow in DIB coder can result in out of bounds read or write

References

  • https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/security/advisories/GHSA-hffp-q43q-qq76
  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28693
  • https://github.com/dlemstra/Magick.NET/releases/tag/14.10.4
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hffp-q43q-qq76

items.title: [Magick.NET-Q16-AnyCPU] ImageMagick: Integer overflow in DIB coder can result in out of bounds read or write

items.content_html:
An uninitialized pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the JBIG decoder due to a missing check.

References

  • https://github.com/ImageMagick/ImageMagick/security/advisories/GHSA-wj8w-pjxf-9g4f
  • https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28691
  • https://github.com/dlemstra/Magick.NET/releases/tag/14.10.4
  • https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wj8w-pjxf-9g4f
items.title: [Magick.NET-Q8-x86] ImageMagick has uninitialized pointer dereference in JBIG decoder
